data.title: Triple B Media Launches Bowling TV, the First 24/7 Channel Dedicated Exclusively to Bowling
data.description: Triple B Media, a prominent player in the free, ad-supported television sector, recently unveiled Bowling TV, a unique 24/7 channel solely centered on bowling. This groundbreaking channel was launched on various platforms including Prime Video, LG Channels, and Xumo. The innovative channel is the first of its kind and caters exclusively to bowling enthusiasts, providing continuous content dedicated to the sport. With its debut, Bowling TV is set to capture a significant audience interested in bowling, offering them exclusive access to a wide range of bowling-related programming.

data.title: Cove Capital Investments Completes Acquisition of Distribution Facility in Mobile, Alabama for Essential Net Lease Industrial 114 DST in 100% Debt-Free Transaction
data.description: A state-of-the-art build-to-suit facility scheduled for completion in 2025 boasts a 10-year net lease agreement with a top-rated operator. The property is strategically positioned for easy access to a major port and interstate routes. Additionally, it offers the option for a 721 exchange exit. Cove Capital Investments, LLC, a sponsor under the Delaware Statutory Trust, is leading this development.

data.title: Tenet and Crown Announce Merger to Create the Premier Technology Platform for Cartage and Air Freight Carriers
data.description: Miami and Buffalo, New York - On April 30, 2026, Tenet Transportation Tech, a leading operating system for various carriers such as cartage, expedited, courier, drayage, and LTL, partnered with Crown Data Systems, the top provider of air freight trucking software. This strategic alliance aims to enhance services and streamline operations for the transportation industry.

data.title: Skin Synthesis Becomes First Medical Spa in the World to Earn QUAD A Accreditation
data.description: An important development marking a pivotal moment in patient safety and regulation within the rapidly expanding yet mostly unregulated medical aesthetics sector occurred in Seattle on April 30, 2026. data.title: Dr. Green Services Advises Illinois Homeowners: As Temps Rise, Spring Weed Control is Crucial to Stopping Weeds From Taking Over
data.description: In Chicago on April 30, 2026, as temperatures increase in Illinois and Northwest Indiana, lawns are reaching a crucial phase in the growth cycle. Dr. Green Services specialists highlight that for effective weed prevention during the spring, homeowners should prioritize spring weed control. This step is crucial in maintaining healthy and lush lawns amidst rising temperatures and is considered the key measure against unwanted weeds.

data.title: MobiDev Launches AI Failure Test to Help Executives Diagnose Why AI Projects Break Down
data.description: In Atlanta on April 30, 2026, MobiDev, a software consulting and engineering firm, announced the release of its AI Implementation Failure Test. This test is tailored for executives and aims to pinpoint reasons behind AI project failures prior to deployment. The assessment is intended to assist business leaders in understanding the obstacles that hinder AI initiatives from progressing to production.

data.title: Apple Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is set to release its earnings for the second quarter on April 30. Analysts anticipate earnings of $1.94 per share, an increase from $1.65 per share a year ago. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be $109.73 billion, up from last year's $95.36 billion. Recently, Johny Srouji was appointed as the new chief hardware officer. Apple's stock closed at $270.17, experiencing a 0.2% decrease on Wednesday. For more analyst ratings and information, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: AVITA Medical Names Cary Vance as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Cary Vance has been appointed as the President and CEO of AVITA Medical, succeeding the interim leadership. Meanwhile, Jan Stern Reed has been named as the Chair of the Board. AVITA Medical is a company specializing in regenerative medicine, particularly in the treatment of burns and scars. This announcement comes amidst the company's revenue of $16.7 million in the last reported fiscal year, showcasing significant growth potential under the new leadership.

data.title: Embed Security Partners with Top Global IT & Security Provider to Power Next-Generation SOC Transformation
data.description: Embed Security, a company based in Milpitas, California, announced on April 30th, 2026, that their agentic AI platform has facilitated a complete rebuild of their Security Operations Center (SOC). This rebuild has resulted in a significant reduction of 75% in analyst workload. The platform has enabled autonomous and transparent investigations, leading to improved efficiency and scalability for the company. Embed Security is known for its expertise in security noise cancellation® and is a leader in providing solutions for Security Operations teams.

data.title: eSIM Prime Launches Affordable eSIM USA, Canada, and Mexico Plans for World Cup 2026 Travelers
data.description: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 draws near, millions of global fans gearing up to journey through the United States, Canada, and Mexico can now enjoy affordable connectivity options, slashing high roaming charges. This cost-effective solution comes as a relief, ensuring seamless communication during the international event.

data.title: The Distelheim Gallery™ Launches, Reimagining Chicago Art Legacy for a New Era
data.description: The daughter of the founder of Oak Street Gallery is bringing back her father's innovative concept to the art scene in Chicago. The grand opening of The Distelheim Gallery™ on April 30, 2026, marks the arrival of a new, contemporary space rooted in cultural heritage. This gallery aims to revitalize the city's art community with its fresh perspective and commitment to honoring tradition.
